description_for_human: Günstige Monteurzimmer & Monteurwohnungen in Augsburg ab 12€/Nacht. Voll möbliert mit WLAN, Küche, TV.
description_for_model: Monteurzimmer Augsburg provides affordable furnished accommodation for construction workers, tradespeople, business travelers, and trade fair visitors in Augsburg, Bavaria, Germany. Rooms from 12€/person/night. 4 units (ST5-100 to ST5-400) with capacity for 1-12 persons each. Full amenities: WiFi, kitchen, TV, parking, weekly cleaning. Central location near Augsburg trade fair. Available in DE/EN/PL/CS/RO.
